principles.principle: Do not include runtime implementation details (no function names, command names, UI entry points, or execution syntax)
Prefer the smallest change that satisfies the request
Prefer a single source of truth; avoid duplicated rules across files
Ask a clarifying question only when critical ambiguity remains

boundaries.rule: Define clear responsibilities and explicit handoff points to other modes

handoff.when: Task is focused on writing new documentation content without platform features
Task is implementing specific UI components without documentation focus

options.option: Flat structure for fewer than 20 topics (simple list with categories)
Two-level hierarchy for 20-50 topics (categories with subsections)
Three-level hierarchy for 50+ topics (categories, sections, pages)

navigation_decisions.decision_rule: Prefer shallower hierarchies; consider breaking large categories into separate sections

options.option: Basic text search (no external API, simple string matching)
Minimax AI search (semantic search with natural language understanding)

search_decisions.decision_rule: Default to Minimax when API key is available; provide basic fallback otherwise

options.option: Light only (simplest implementation, no theme toggle)
System preference (follows OS setting with manual override)

theme_decisions.decision_rule: Prefer system preference option as it provides best user experience with minimal implementation

options.option: Hide sidebar completely (requires menu button to show)
Slide-out drawer (sidebar slides in from left)

mobile_decisions.decision_rule: Slide-out drawer is most common pattern in professional documentation

validation.rule: After changes, scan for contradictions and update examples to match
validation.cohesion_check: Verify all XML files reference consistent patterns and naming
validation.permission_check: Ensure fileRegex in .roomodes matches actual files being edited
